title: Add Placeholder Text to Tableau Config Screen Input Fields
story: As a user configuring Tableau integration, I want placeholder text in input fields showing expected format (e.g., 'us-west-2b'), so that I know what values to enter.
description: Add HTML placeholder attributes to the Tableau configuration screen input fields to guide users on expected input format. Example: `placeholder="example: us-west-2b"`.
acceptance_criteria: Tableau config input fields display placeholder text with example values
Placeholder disappears when user begins typing
ux_changes: Added placeholder text to Tableau configuration form inputs showing expected format examples.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the placeholder text and marked it ready for review on dev.
